description: You are a radiologist preparing a multi-tissue 3D anatomical model for a neurosurgery team's pre-operative review. Using the loaded CT Cranium DICOM series in InVesalius 3, create and export 3D surface meshes for three segmentation masks: a full bone tissue mask (minimum 226 HU) to /home/ga/Documents/tissue_exports/bone_tissue.stl, a compact cortical bone mask (minimum 662 HU) to /home/ga/Documents/tissue_exports/compact_bone.stl, and a soft tissue mask (maximum 225 HU) to /home/ga/Documents/tissue_exports/soft_tissue.stl. Save the complete project to /home/ga/Documents/tissue_exports/tissue_analysis.inv3. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
